title: Builder's Vanilla Additions
description: This mod simply adds building blocks that should already exist in Minecraft.
body:
# **Builder's Vanilla Additions**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/VJ00BfkIzTs" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Description:**

This mod simply adds building blocks that should already exist in Minecraft.

Blocks, slabs, stairs, and walls make up most of the mod however there are a few other things added and more to come in future updates.

All content in the mod is useable in Creative and Survival modes.

A wiki page is planned.

**Installation:**

FORGE:

1. Download and install Minecraft Forge.
2. Download Builder's Vanilla Additions Forge version and place it in your mods folder.

_Note: Make sure you are using the proper version of Minecraft Forge._

FABRIC:

1. Download and install Fabric.
2. Download Fabric API and place it in your mods folder.
3. Download Builders Vanilla Additions Fabric version and place it in your mods folder.

_Note: Make sure you are using the proper version of Fabric and Fabric API._


**Coming soon:**

Minecraft 1.20, Forge (T.B.A.)

Minecraft 1.20 Fabric (T.B.A.)
